infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: OSPREY uses your location to track GPS runs and log route maps.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: OSPREY uses background location to continue tracking your route if you lock your screen mid-run.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: OSPREY uses motion data to detect your activity type and count steps.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: OSPREY reads your workouts, heart rate, and activity data to personalize your coaching.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: OSPREY saves your workouts and body metrics to Apple Health.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: OSPREY uses the microphone for voice workout logging — speak your sets and reps instead of typing.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: OSPREY uses the camera to scan food barcodes and photograph meals for quick logging.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: OSPREY lets you pick a meal photo from your library to log food with Ozzie's help.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: OSPREY blocks time for your planned workouts on your calendar so they don't get double-booked.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: OSPREY uses background location to track your route during workouts.

plugins.cameraPermission: OSPREY uses the camera to scan food barcodes.

plugins.photosPermission: OSPREY lets you pick a meal photo from your library to log food with Ozzie's help.

plugins.calendarPermission: OSPREY blocks time for your planned workouts on your calendar so they don't get double-booked.
